title: CT2.decide.replacementCandidate completed discharge record — Replacement-candidate search — candidate state or exhaustive absence
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for semantic CT2-v2 node CT2.decide.replacementCandidate. It fixes the runtime identity, presentation order, successful status, and exact contract evidence without converting the semantic ID back to a numbered obligation ID.

tacticId.description: Owning tactic discriminator for CT2.decide.replacementCandidate; it must be CT2.

nodeId.description: Stable semantic runtime identifier for Replacement-candidate search — candidate state or exhaustive absence.

nodeNumber.description: One-based presentation-order index for CT2.decide.replacementCandidate; it is not part of the semantic identity.

status.description: Required successful completion state for CT2.decide.replacementCandidate, matching its decision runtime role.

dischargedContracts.description: Exact contract families discharged at CT2.decide.replacementCandidate: S-Dich, S-Comp, S-Equiv.

contains.description: Requires S-Dich, which provides the exhaustive proof-carrying decision constructors.
Requires S-Comp, which retains the strict comparison evidence consumed by local minimality.
Requires S-Equiv, which certifies the selected replacement candidate or records a separating context.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract instances for CT2.decide.replacementCandidate; one S-Dich, S-Comp, S-Equiv record is required for each declared family.

schema.description: Discriminator for the S-Dich evidence at CT2.decide.replacementCandidate; this instance provides the exhaustive proof-carrying decision constructors.
Discriminator for the S-Comp evidence at CT2.decide.replacementCandidate; this instance retains the strict comparison evidence consumed by local minimality.
Discriminator for the S-Equiv evidence at CT2.decide.replacementCandidate; this instance certifies the selected replacement candidate or records a separating context.

statement.informal: Replacement-candidate search — candidate state or exhaustive absence.
statement.latex: \textbf{Replacement-candidate search}\\smaller compatible candidate or exhaustive absence

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Supply the declared proof-carrying state, decision, certificate, or payload. Every outgoing edge is available only through its named typed constructor and evidence slots.
